title: limonia angulata
intro: Limonia angulata, also known as the wild calamondin or Philippine lime, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Rutaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limonia angulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Limonia angulata is often used to make tea, infusions, and essential oils that can be applied topically or ingested for its various health benefits.
